title: rubus simplex
intro: Rubus simplex, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus simplex include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its extracts have been used in herbal preparations to promote overall well-being.
